name: Pawn Shop NYC
description_short: 47 Street Pawn Shop is a NYC-based collateral lender specializing in luxury jewelry, watches, diamonds, and gold loans with flexible repayment terms and low interest rates.
description_long:
47 Street Pawn Shop operates from the Diamond District in Midtown Manhattan (30 West 47th St, 8th Floor) and has been serving the NYC metro area including Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, Staten Island, Long Island, and New Jersey for many years. The shop functions as a traditional pawn operation but with specialization in high-ticket luxury items rather than general merchandise.

The company offers collateral-based loans on gold, diamonds, watches, jewelry, coins, and estate pieces. Their loan products include bridge loans (short-term with no credit checks and item return upon repayment), sale advance loans (upfront capital while items are sold), and term loans ($100,000+ with interest rates under 1% monthly). They advertise promotional rates including 0% interest for the first 30 days on gold pawns and 90-day payment deferrals on diamonds. All transactions are handled by staff including certified diamond gemologists and watch specialists.

The company differentiates itself through on-site diamond refining capabilities, eliminating middleman markups, and claims to pay more than melt value for branded designer jewelry (Rolex, Cartier, Tiffany, Patek Philippe, Breitling). They emphasize discrete, professional service and low interest rates compared to competitors. Their website displays three 5-star customer reviews praising low rates and flexible payment terms.

As a pawn shop, this business model requires customers to pledge personal assets as collateral and carry the risk of losing items if loans are not repaid. While the promotional rates and flexibility are appealing, the underlying economics of pawn lending mean customers receive significantly less cash than an item's retail value. The business targets individuals who need immediate liquidity and prefer not to sell valuable items permanently.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: On-site diamond refinery eliminates middleman, potentially yielding higher loan amounts
Promotional rates: 0% interest first 30 days on gold; 90-day payment deferrals on diamonds
Certified diamond gemologists and specialized watch evaluation team
Flexible repayment terms (minimum payments deferred 61-120 days for diamonds)
Offers multiple loan structures: bridge loans, sale advances, and term loans up to $100K+
Located in Diamond District with access to wholesale markets and market expertise
No credit checks required; based purely on collateral value assessment
cons: Pawn model inherently pays significantly below retail/resale value for pledged items
Customer reviews are dated (2013-2015) with only 3 total reviews; no current ratings visible
Limited transparency on actual interest rates, loan-to-value ratios, or fee structures
Website contains grammatical errors and incomplete content ('QUICK LINKS' section cuts off), suggesting minimal maintenance
Risk of permanent loss if customer cannot repay loan within stated term window
best_for: High-net-worth individuals needing immediate capital while retaining ownership of luxury watches, jewelry, or diamonds
Small business owners or real estate investors seeking bridge financing without credit scrutiny
Customers with damaged, broken, or non-liquid luxury items seeking quick cash without sale hassle
diagnosis: 47 Street Pawn Shop is best for affluent borrowers in the NYC metro area who own luxury items and need immediate capital without selling or undergoing credit review, particularly those leveraging designer watches or fine jewelry. The primary caveat is that pawn lending inherently discounts assets substantially below market value, and failure to repay results in permanent loss of the pledged item—making this appropriate only for borrowers who can reliably service the debt within the stated term.
services: Gold collateral loans with low interest rates
Diamond and engagement ring pawn loans
Luxury watch loans (Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe, Breitling, Panerai)
Precious metal coin and rare coin loans
Bridge loans (short-term with item return upon repayment)
Sale advance loans (upfront capital while items are sold)
Term loans ($100,000+ at under 1% monthly interest)
Designer/branded jewelry appraisal and loan valuation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 30 W 47th St Suite #807, New York, NY 10036
